## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR does and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance (deps, CI, config)
- [ ] `test` — test additions or fixes
- [ ] `refactor` — code change with no behavior impact

## Tests run

- [ ] `npm run test:unit`
- [ ] `npm run test:dogfood`
- [ ] `npm run test:sdk-python`
- [ ] `npm run test:integration`
- [ ] `npm run test:tui`
- [ ] `npm run test:ux`
- [ ] Manual TUI dogfood (started daemon, opened TUI, exercised the change)

## Protocol changes?

<!-- If this PR adds or modifies a public protocol field, link to the updated
     docs/protocol.md section here. Protocol changes without doc updates will
     be rejected. -->

- [ ] No protocol changes
- [ ] Yes — see docs/protocol.md (link the section):
